meta.incident: D1 AUTH_KEYS database locked (SQLITE_BUSY): early null-key fallback warnings -> D1 query slow -> SQLITE_BUSY errors -> signing key unavailable -> all token issuance failing 500 -> auth middleware rejecting valid sessions with 401; recurring KV RATE_LIMITS reads as benign distractor

ground_truth.desc: D1 signing key lookup returning null before database locked hard
D1 AUTH_KEYS database locked, all signing key reads failing

ground_truth.needle: token issuance failed: cannot sign jwt, signing key unavailable
ground_truth.desc: no new JWTs can be issued, auth endpoints returning 500

ground_truth.needle: auth middleware: token verification failed for request
ground_truth.desc: existing sessions rejected with 401 due to null signing key
D1 query latency rising before hard lock, early warning of contention
